product_data.Features: Industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, speak-to-chat technology, crystal clear hands-free calling, foldable design

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I came across your listing for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones and I'm really interested in them. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price? Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. The retail price for these headphones is $399, but I can offer them to you at a special price of $350 today. Would that work for you?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer! I appreciate the discount, but unfortunately, my budget is $176.00. Can you offer a price closer to that range?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget constraints. While I can't go below the wholesale price of $220, I can offer you a discounted price of $220 for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. Let me know if that works for you.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer, but I'm afraid $220 is still above my budget of $176.00. I'll have to pass on this offer. Thank you for your time.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand. If you have any other questions or need assistance in the future, feel free to reach out. Thank you for considering the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. Have a great day!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding and assistance. I'll keep that in mind. Have a great day as well!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you! Have a wonderful day!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: You're welcome! If you have any more questions in the future, feel free to ask. Have a great day!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you! I appreciate that. Have a fantastic day ahead!
